name: metrics.subscribe
description: Create a real-time metrics subscription for SSE streaming. Returns subscription metadata; use the subscription_id to establish an SSE connection for continuous metric updates.

metrics.description: Optional list of specific metrics to stream (empty = all metrics)

refresh_interval_seconds.description: How often to push metric updates in seconds

metrics.description: List of metrics included in subscription (null = all)

created_at.description: ISO timestamp when subscription was created

event_count.description: Number of events streamed so far (0 at creation)
